title: Add Column to tab but not main table
excerpt: When we add a new column to a tab on a board, it auto adds to the main table (which is fine) but also to all the other tabs in the board. If a tab is created in the main board, it should copy to all tabs. However, if a c…

posts.author: ecottrell23 (Erin Cottrell)
posts.cookedHtml: When we add a new column to a tab on a board, it auto adds to the main table (which is fine) but also to all the other tabs in the board. If a tab is created in the main board, it should copy to all tabs. However, if a column is created in a specific tab, it is typically only relevant to that one tab and creates manual work to remove the column from the unnecessary tabs. Is there a way to avoid copying a new column onto all tabs within a board when it is created in a tab?
